mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, role_id, real_name, phone, status, freeze_status, freeze_reason, freeze_expire_time, last_login_time, created_at, updated_at FROM `user` WHERE username = #{account} OR email = #{account} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, role_id, real_name, phone, status, freeze_status, freeze_reason, freeze_expire_time, last_login_time, created_at, updated_at FROM `user` WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, role_id, real_name, phone, status, freeze_status, freeze_reason, freeze_expire_time, last_login_time, created_at, updated_at FROM `user` WHERE id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
